details.test: Task 1: Book earliest 60-min healthcare consultation next week
Task 2: Request proposal for Customer Support Automation with budget and timeline
Task 3: Choose cheapest AI readiness package with data audit and start checkout
Task 4: Save e-commerce case study with >=15% revenue uplift and inquire about similar project
Task 5: Use AI ROI calculator to reach target savings and payback, then email results
Task 6: Subscribe to AI strategy newsletter and download 2024 AI Strategy Playbook
Task 7: Build custom AI services bundle with AI Roadmap Workshop under $12k/month and contact sales
Task 8: Use AI assistant to select consulting package under $10k/month and contact sales
Task 9: Register for AI for Marketing webinar happening next month
